flavor: Give to the Joseph Dredd player.
name: Refused Backup
text: Give to the Joseph Dredd player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Joseph Dredd → remove Refused Backup from the game. • Discard 1 identity-specific support or identity-specific upgrade you control. If no card was discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

flavor: Long ago, its Judges realized all crime was committed by the living. Therefore, life itself was declared illegal.
name: Deadworld
text: Forced Interrupt: Each [[Undead]] minion gains teamwork. Forced Interrupt: At the beginning of the villain phase, in player order, each player searches the encounter deck for an [[Undead]] minion and puts it into play engaged with them.

name: Judge Death
text: While Judge Death is engaged with a player, that player's identity cannot ready. (Judge Dredd's nemesis minion.)

flavor: "Every nightmare you had when you were sssmall. Every time you were cold or alone... that wasss me."
name: Judge Fear
text: Forced Response: After Judge Fear attacks and damages a character, stun that character.

name: Judge Fire
text: [star] Judge Fire's attacks deal indirect damage.

name: Judge Mortis
text: While Judge Mortis is engaged with you, your hand size is reduced by 1.
